name: Difficulties Reimagined
description: Adds more difficulties! Like, a LOT more!

use-req-difficulty.name: Use Requested Difficulty
use-req-difficulty.description: When level has no rate instead of Robtop's average difficulty will be used requested by creator difficulty.

always-use-req-difficulty.name: Always Use Requested Difficulty
always-use-req-difficulty.description: Requested difficulty will be used even on rated levels (this does not affect rewards).
